title: Supply Chain Manager - Jet Freight Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Jet Freight Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
